findings.description: The source code comment `// hidden暗号化を行っていれば発生しないエラー` immediately before `userSearchFormContext.abortIfInvalid()` is omitted. This comment conveys a behavioral constraint: the validation error thrown by `abortIfInvalid()` will not occur when hidden encryption is in use. This is decision-necessary information for developers implementing this pattern.
findings.source_evidence:
// hidden暗号化を行っていれば発生しないエラー
userSearchFormContext.abortIfInvalid();

findings.description: The annotation hint `OnError` is missing the `@` prefix — it should be `@OnError` to match the annotation syntax in the source. Additionally, three PascalCase class names present in the code sample — `HttpResponse`, `HttpRequest`, and `ExecutionContext` — are absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: @OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, ...) public HttpResponse doRW11AC0301(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx)
